ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "total_area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth in the country */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate per 1000 live births */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Human Development Index (HDI) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the province belongs to */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the province */,
  "total_area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  "governor_name" TEXT /* Name of the governor of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the county */,
  "total_area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* County seat */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the mayor of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the data is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases on the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths on the given date */,
  "fatality_rate" REAL /* Fatality rate (deaths per 100 cases) */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate (recovered cases per 100 cases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health trend entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the trend is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "confirmed_cases_trend" TEXT /* Trend description for confirmed cases (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "active_cases_trend" TEXT /* Trend description for active cases (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "recovered_cases_trend" TEXT /* Trend description for recovered cases (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "deaths_trend" TEXT /* Trend description for deaths (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "r_value" REAL /* Reproduction number (R value) for the given trend */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of cases per day for the given trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the demographic is for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Number of people in the age group and gender */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population (e.g., high school, college, graduate) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the population (e.g., employed, unemployed, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the facility is in */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the healthcare facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the healthcare facility (number of beds) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the healthcare facility (address or coordinates) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facilities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vacc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the data is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination data */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate (percentage of the population vaccinated) */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of vaccine doses administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, AstraZeneca) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, research institute) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the data source (e.g., DOI, PMID) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License for the data source (e.g., CC-BY, CC-NC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "pred_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the prediction is for */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the predictive model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of cases */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of the prediction */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pred_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the intervention is for */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "funding" REAL /* Funding allocated for the intervention */,
  "implementing_agency" TEXT /* Agency implementing the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., reduction in cases, hospitalization rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the post was made (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme for the visualization */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Font size for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
